title: gemini in chat
description: Adds in-game Gemini AI chat support for Fabric servers. Players can type /gemini <question> in chat to get responses from Google's Gemini AI model. Server operators can manage the API key with /gemini_api_key. Designed for Minecraft 26.1.2 Fabric.
body:
Gemini Chat 🤖
Bring Google's Gemini AI directly into your Minecraft server chat!
Features

/gemini <question> — ask Gemini anything, response shown to all players
/gemini_api_key <key> — set your Google Gemini API key (saved permanently across restarts)
/gemini_api_key delete — remove the stored API key
Uses Gemma 4 31B model for high quality responses
Async — server never freezes while waiting for AI response
API key stored securely in the server config folder

Setup

Install the mod and Fabric API
Get a free API key at Google AI Studio
Join your server and run /gemini_api_key YOUR_KEY
Done! Anyone on the server can now use /gemini

Requirements

Minecraft 26.1.2
Fabric Loader 0.18.6+
Fabric API

Usage Example
/gemini what is the best strategy for defeating the ender dragon?

[Gemini] The best strategy is to first destroy the end crystals on top of the obsidian pillars...


Free API key available at aistudio.google.com — no credit card required.
